stimulus: A student looking at the table claimed that, in this county, hotter areas have fewer shaded playgrounds. In areas where the highest average summer surface temperature was 110°–120° Fahrenheit, ______
stem: Which choice most effectively uses data from the table to complete the student’s claim?
rationale:
Choice C is correct because the table shows 34% of playgrounds in 110°–120° areas have shade, supporting the student’s claim that hotter areas have fewer shaded playgrounds.

Choice A is incorrect: 62% corresponds to 100°–110° areas. Choice B is incorrect: 85% corresponds to areas below 100°. Choice D is incorrect: 22% corresponds to areas above 120°.
